content: I have raw FASTQ data and I need to complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data. Complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data: Processes raw FASTQ data through adapter and bad quality removal (fastp), alignment with STAR using ENCODE parameters, gene quantification via multiple methods (STAR and featureCounts), and expression calculation (FPKM with Cufflinks/StringTie, normalized coverage with bedtools). Produces count tables, normalized expression values, and genomic coverage tracks. Supports stranded and unstranded libraries, generating both HTSeq-compatible counts and normalized measures for downstream analysis. Use SRR5085167_forward.fastqsanger.gz, SRR5085167_reverse.fastqsanger.gz. Be explicit about each step and the expected deliverables. Prefer this guidance when available: Complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data. Return structured outputs for analysis_type, artifact_name, workflow_step_count.
